recall_layers.claim_boundary: Explains why the task is in scope; it is not participant validation.
Defines the retrieval task and provenance fields; gold remains pending corpus verification.
Finds and connects source-native metadata; it does not answer from retained page bodies.

recall_layers.claim_boundary: Current page content is recalled from GOV.UK at answer time, outside the metadata bundle.

recall_layers.claim_boundary: A time-stamped comparator observation, not OKF ground truth or a stable GOV.UK Chat contract.
recall_layers.source: captured answer plus ordered source cards
